scenes.title: Why Articulate Exists
scenes.headline: Why Articulate Exists
scenes.support: Architecture knowledge is fragmented, changing and never complete.

scenes.title: The architecture itself
scenes.headline: Understanding the architecture itself
scenes.support: Not the diagrams. Not the documentation. The architecture.

scenes.title: Capable technology
scenes.headline: Modern technology is remarkably capable
scenes.support: Yet understanding the architecture remains difficult.

scenes.title: Architectural questions
scenes.headline: Surprisingly simple questions
items: What does the current state look like?
Why was it designed this way?

scenes.title: Architecture enables change
scenes.headline: Architecture exists to enable change
scenes.support: Understand today's architecture so it can safely evolve into tomorrow's.

scenes.title: Scattered knowledge
scenes.headline: Architectural knowledge is rarely in one place
scenes.support: Each source contains part of the truth.

scenes.title: Excellent tools
scenes.headline: The industry already has excellent tools
scenes.support: The problem is not that those tools are poor.

scenes.title: Projections of reality
scenes.headline: Each tool represents one projection of reality
scenes.support: The architect is left connecting the pieces together.

scenes.title: The cost of fragmentation
scenes.headline: More searching. Less reasoning.
scenes.support: Fragmentation increases uncertainty across every project.

scenes.title: Why now?
scenes.headline: Reason across unstructured information
scenes.support: Patterns, summaries, contradictions and questions can emerge from incomplete evidence.

scenes.title: Augment, not replace
scenes.headline: Augment architectural thinking
scenes.support: Humans remain responsible for judgement and decisions.

scenes.title: From side project to question
scenes.headline: Several false starts. One broader question.
scenes.support: The companion bridges from capability to the project's uncertain vision.

scenes.title: The central question
scenes.headline: Can architecture become a continuously evolving body of knowledge?
scenes.support: Instead of a collection of disconnected documents.
items: Whether that proves achievable remains to be seen.

scenes.title: Principles before features
scenes.headline: Principles before features
scenes.support: Technology changes. The principles should endure.

scenes.title: What success is not
scenes.headline: Not simply better diagrams or more documentation
scenes.support: Success starts with less time searching and more time solving meaningful problems.

scenes.title: What success means
scenes.headline: Preserve knowledge. Reduce uncertainty.
scenes.support: Improve the conversations architects have about change.

scenes.title: Looking ahead
scenes.headline: Principles, requirements, constraints and experiments
scenes.support: Some ideas will succeed. Some will fail. Many will change.

scenes.title: An exploration
scenes.headline: An exploration into how we might build better architecture
